en_title: The Odyssey Rating and Custom IMAX Camera Popcorn Bucket Revealed
cn_title: 《奥德赛》R级评级，IMAX爆米花桶曝光
subtitle: 史诗级爆米花桶
opus_summary: 克里斯托弗·诺兰新作《奥德赛》获MPAA R级评级，17岁以下需家长陪同。诺兰此前暑期档多为PG-13，但R级未阻《奥本海默》本土票房超3.3亿美元(约合人民币23.6亿元)。IMAX 70mm等高端票需求极高，AMC应用一度暂停。该片为首部全IMAX拍摄电影，官方爆米花桶设计成IMAX相机造型。影片7月17日上映，主演包括马特·达蒙、安妮·海瑟薇、汤姆·霍兰德、罗伯特·帕丁森等。

paragraphs.en: Director Christopher Nolan’s The Odyssey has been rated “R” by the Motion Picture Association, which means filmgoers under the age of 17 will be required to have a parent or guardian accompany them when screening the film.
paragraphs.cn: 导演克里斯托弗·诺兰的《奥德赛》已被美国电影协会评为R级，这意味着17岁以下观众观影时须有家长或监护人陪同。

paragraphs.en: As Variety points out, most of Nolan’s other summer movies, such as his Dark Knight trilogy, earned PG-13 ratings, although an R rating didn’t prevent Oppenheimer from earning over $330 million at the domestic box office.
paragraphs.cn: 据《综艺》指出，诺兰的其他暑期档电影（如《黑暗骑士》三部曲）多为PG-13级，但R级并未阻碍《奥本海默》本土票房突破3.3亿美元(约合人民币23.6亿元)。

paragraphs.en: The trade also reports that audience demand for premium format tickets such as IMAX 70mm “appears to be so high that AMC‘s ticketing app paused briefly . Sales have resumed, but wait times are up to an hour. … Fandango’s website also appeared to be dragging with users experiencing long wait times.”
paragraphs.cn: 该媒体还报道称，观众对IMAX 70mm等高端格式票的需求「似乎极高，导致AMC的售票应用短暂暂停。销售已恢复，但等待时间长达一小时……Fandango网站也出现卡顿，用户等待时间很长。」

paragraphs.en: The Odyssey is the first film in history – and one of Nolan’s longest movies – to be shot entirely in IMAX, a milestone commemorated by the movie’s official popcorn bucket, which is in the shape of an IMAX camera.
paragraphs.cn: 《奥德赛》是历史上首部——也是诺兰最长的电影之一——完全使用IMAX拍摄的电影，这一里程碑被官方爆米花桶纪念，其造型为IMAX相机。

paragraphs.en: The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Anne Hathaway, Tom Holland, Robert Pattinson, Zendaya, Lupita Nyong’o, Charlize Theron, and Jon Bernthal.
paragraphs.cn: 《奥德赛》主演包括马特·达蒙、安妮·海瑟薇、汤姆·霍兰德、罗伯特·帕丁森、赞达亚、露皮塔·尼永奥、查理兹·塞隆和乔·博恩瑟。

paragraphs.en: For more on Nolan’s Homeric epic, find out how The Odyssey “almost saved” Spider-Man: Brand New Day , read Lupita Nyong’o’s response to the criticism of her casting as Helen of Troy , and Nolan’s defense of his film’s historical accuracy following online complaints.
paragraphs.cn: 欲了解更多诺兰的荷马史诗，可了解《奥德赛》如何「几乎拯救」了《蜘蛛侠：崭新的一天》，阅读露皮塔·尼永奥对饰演海伦批评的回应，以及诺兰在网友质疑后对影片历史准确性的辩护。

paragraphs.en: The Odyssey opens in theaters on July 17th.
paragraphs.cn: 《奥德赛》将于7月17日在影院上映。
